arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso keen to maintain unbeaten run against Bayern
arts.sum: Ahead of Bayer Leverkusen's Champions League cracker against Bayern Munich, Xabi Alonso was asked about the fact that he hasn't lost to the Bavarians since joining Die Werkself.

arts.ttl: Report: Dayot Upamecano extension hinges on Bayern Munich board approval
arts.sum: What about some takes on the recent transfer news involving Bayern Munich being a “realistic” possibility for Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz to to join the Bavarians next season? Bayern Munich ’s plans to secure the future of its central defense look well underway.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich sets price on Kingsley Coman; Chelsea, Manchester United, Arsenal and Tottenham among clubs ready to trigger exit clause on Benjamin Šeško; Real Madrid’s Kylian Mbappé wants Gunners defender in Spain; and MORE!
arts.sum: RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Šeško does, indeed, have a release clause and several clubs — Manchester United, Tottenham Hotspur, Arsenal FC — are interested: Bayern Munich is set to host Bayer Leverkusen in a massively anticipated Champions League showdown.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Bayer Leverkusen: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bayern Munich take on Bayer Leverkusen in the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

Bayern Munich maintained their lead at the top of the Bundesliga table with a 3-1 win over VfB Stuttgart on Friday and they have now failed to win only two of their last eight matches in all competiti...

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich, Alphonso Davies look ready for Champions League; Bayern’s Aleksandar Pavlović, Bayer Leverkusen’s Robert Andrich are reportedly out; Suspension watch; and MORE!
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich involved in full training today and should be available against Leverkusen pic.twitter.com/c6btGp0Y5q Robert Andrich is out of tomorrow's game against Bayern with illness [ @SkySportDE ] pic.twitter.com/vfBvQMDzQf

arts.ttl: Harry Kane's Bayern Munich BANNED from wearing home kit vs Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: An all-German last 16 clash takes centre stage in the Champions League on Wednesday night and while Bayern Munich will play host to Xabi Alonso's Bayer Leverkusen at the Allianz Arena, they won't be able to wear their home shirts

arts.ttl: FC Bayern Campus Round Up: Two devastating defensive injuries overshadow any results
arts.sum: FC Bayern: Played 5, 9 points As for the match itself, it followed a rather similar pattern to many this season: Bayern struggled to break down the opposition backline through anything other than individual brilliance, made silly mistakes at the back to concede big chances and were left with nothing.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Loan Works: Alexander Nübel falls short again against Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Krätzig started on the bench for Heidenheim against Monchengladbach, but came into the match in the 71st minute, when his team was down 3-0. There are four players on loan in the German Bundesliga: Alexander Nübel, Franz Krätzig, Paul Wanner, and Armindo Sieb.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies plays coy when asked about Joshua Kimmich’s Bayern Munich contract
arts.sum: It is also now understood that Kimmich was pushing to try to get a four-year deal, while the club only wants to offer a three-year deal, as there is an ongoing effort to cut overall wages across the club to try to plan for future signings; a la Florian Wirtz from Bayer Leverkusen. Kimmich still hasn’t signed a new deal and the clock is ticking for Bayern and the midfielder.
